items.name: Paneer Makhani
items.description: Slightly sweet creamy dish of home-made cottage cheese in a tomato butter sauce. (contain nuts)
items.simplified_description: A creamy, slightly sweet dish made with homemade cheese in a tomato butter sauce that contains nuts.

items.name: Kadhai Paneer
items.description: Indian cottage cheese cooked with assorted bell peppers, onion in Kadhai gravy.
items.simplified_description: Cottage cheese cooked with mixed bell peppers and onions in a special gravy.

items.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
items.description: Assorted bell peppers and onions, grill and sautéed with traditional homemade cheese in a butter onion gravy. (contain nuts)
items.simplified_description: Grilled cheese with bell peppers and onions in a buttery onion sauce that contains nuts.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: A mild, much-favored dish of chicken (breast) roasted in the tandoor, and then cooked in butter, Cashewnut gravy, creamy tomato sauce, garnished with rich cream. (contain nuts)
items.simplified_description: Mild roasted chicken in a creamy tomato sauce with butter and cashew nuts.

items.name: Chicken tikka masala
items.description: Chicken (breast) marinated and grilled in tandoor, then simmered in masala sauce with sautéed capsicum and onions. (Contain nuts)
items.simplified_description: Grilled chicken in a spiced sauce with sautéed peppers and onions that contains nuts.

items.name: Chicken Curry
items.description: Chicken (thigh) cooked in a flavorful curry with whole garam masala.
items.simplified_description: Chicken cooked in a flavorful curry with whole spices.

items.name: Kadhai Chicken
items.description: (Thigh) Chicken morsels cooked with onion tomatoes masala and homemade spices.
items.simplified_description: Chicken pieces cooked with onion and tomato spices.

items.name: Chicken Korma
items.description: Chicken (thigh) cooked in a thick and aromatic creamy sauce with ground cashew nuts, and spices. (contain nuts)
items.simplified_description: Chicken in a thick, aromatic creamy sauce with ground cashew nuts.

items.name: Mango fish/Mango prawn curry
items.description: Light aromatic fish/prawn curry stewed in mango pulp & infused in coconut milk.
items.simplified_description: A light curry made with fish or prawns, mango pulp, and coconut milk.

items.name: Fish Masala/Prawn Masala
items.description: Basa fish/prawn tossed with flavorful onion and tomato masala.
items.simplified_description: Fish or prawns cooked with a flavorful onion and tomato sauce.

items.name: Goan fish/Goan prawn curry
items.description: Goan curry is a warm and tangy fish/prawn curry that is cooled with coconut milk.
items.simplified_description: A warm and tangy curry made with fish or prawns and coconut milk.

items.name: Fish curry/Prawn Curry
items.description: Basa Fish/Prawn cooked in a flavorful curry with the homemade spices.
items.simplified_description: Fish or prawns cooked in a flavorful homemade curry.

items.name: Malai Kofta
items.description: Cottage cheese, potatoes dumplings deep fried and cooked with creamy cashew nut sauce. (contain nuts)
items.simplified_description: Deep-fried dumplings made of cheese and potatoes in a creamy cashew sauce.

items.name: Chicken Biryani
items.description: Chicken biryani is a delicious Pakistani/Indian rice dish that’s typically reserved for special occasions such as weddings, parties, or holidays such as Ramadan.
items.simplified_description: A flavorful rice dish with chicken, often served on special occasions.

items.name: Basmati Rice
items.description: Long grain flavorsome steamed basmati rice.
items.simplified_description: Steamed basmati rice with a flavorful taste.

items.name: Jeera Rice
items.description: Flavored basmati rice tempered with cumin on DUM.

items.name: Coconut Rice
items.description: Basmati rice flavored with coconut, mustard seeds and curry leaves.
items.simplified_description: Basmati rice with coconut, mustard seeds, and curry leaves.
